description: Auto-bugfix rotating scan manifest. Tracks which scan units have been scanned and their bug yield.

units.name: Shared Libraries
units.scan_hint: Focus on shared utility functions, database pool, circuit breaker, auth validators, and RAG context services. Bugs here affect all 50+ downstream services.

units.name: Core Platform (Tier 1)
units.scan_hint: Tier 1 critical services: websocket-ingestion (8001), data-api (8006), admin-api (8004), health-dashboard (3000), data-retention, ha-simulator. Focus on data integrity, auth, and connection handling.

units.name: HA AI Agent Service
units.scan_hint: Largest single service (127 .py files). Focus on OpenAI client error handling, entity resolution (or-vs-is-not-None patterns), context builder, and chat session management.

units.name: AI Automation Service
units.scan_hint: 101 .py files. Focus on template validation, YAML generation, post-action verification, and the unified validation router.

units.name: Device Intelligence Service
units.scan_hint: 99 .py files with 36 .pkl model files. Focus on model loading (joblib cross-version), tensor shape mismatches, feature extraction, and prediction error handling.

units.name: Automation Core (remaining)
units.scan_hint: Scan ai-query-service, ai-code-executor, automation-linter, automation-trace-service, ha-device-control, yaml-validation-service. SKIP ha-ai-agent-service and ai-automation-service-new (they have their own units).

units.name: ML Engine (remaining)
units.scan_hint: Scan ai-core-service, ai-training-service, ml-service, rag-service, model-prep, ner-service, nlp-fine-tuning, openai-service, openvino-service. SKIP device-intelligence-service (has its own unit).

units.name: AI Pattern Service
units.scan_hint: Very large (6400+ .py files, mostly generated). Focus on the core service files in src/, not generated pattern data. Look for API endpoint bugs, data processing errors, and resource leaks.

units.name: Energy Analytics
units.scan_hint: 3 services: energy-correlator, energy-forecasting, proactive-agent-service. Focus on time-series calculations, forecasting model accuracy, and correlation logic.

units.name: Blueprints
units.scan_hint: 4 services: blueprint-index, blueprint-suggestion-service, rule-recommendation-ml, automation-miner. Focus on recommendation logic, blueprint validation, and rule mining accuracy.

units.name: Device Management
units.scan_hint: 8 services: device-health-monitor, device-context-classifier, device-setup-assistant, device-database-client, device-recommender, activity-recognition, activity-writer, ha-setup-service. Focus on device state tracking, health monitoring thresholds, and setup workflows.

units.name: Data Collectors
units.scan_hint: 8 services: weather-api, smart-meter-service, sports-api, air-quality-service, carbon-intensity-service, electricity-pricing-service, calendar-service, log-aggregator. Focus on API response parsing, rate limiting, retry logic, and data normalization.

units.name: API Automation Edge
units.scan_hint: Edge service for pattern analysis API. Focus on request routing, edge caching, and upstream service communication.

units.name: Frontends
units.scan_hint: 3 apps: ai-automation-ui, observability-dashboard, voice-gateway. Mostly TypeScript/JSX but some Python backends. Focus on Python API handlers if present.
